c-suite_officer: Prajwal Gadtaula: Founder & Chief Data Officer (Past Director of ProPlus Data Private Limited)
exact_hq_location: PLOT NO 37 FLAT NO 3 AND 4 SUMA SWAROOP COLONY, SINHGAD ROAD ANAND NAGAR, Pune, Maharashtra, India, 411041
industry_and_segment: DaaS (Data-as-a-Service) company providing 360-degree data solutions for sales and marketing landscape, including prospect intelligence, B2B insights, intent data, technographic data, contact data, and marketing consulting services.
annual_revenue: $7,357,730 (Prospeo). Other sources report $5.50M as of November 24, 2025 (Clodura.AI) and approximately $1.66M as on March 31, 2025 (Tracxn, for ProPlus Data Private Limited).
key_positioning: ProPlus Data positions itself as a premier prospect intelligence and insights company, transforming complex data into precise, actionable intelligence to empower businesses to drive precision in customer acquisition and engagement and elevate sales and marketing performance through data-led precision.
revenue_model: Subscription model with pricing starting from $10k and going beyond $150k+ based on program deliverables. Supported pricing models include One-off purchase, Yearly License, and Usage-based.

milestones: Featured in The Datarade Pulse, a curation of impactful updates and trusted data providers, in April 2025.
Partnered with Custom Media for Account-Based Marketing (ABM) and Account-Based Experience (ABX) services (date not explicitly specified but mentioned in recent press releases).
Active participation and sponsorship in major industry conferences like Gartner Marketing Symposium | Xpo 2025 (June 2025) and Forrester B2B Summit North America.
ProPlus Data Private Limited filed its annual financial statements for the year ended March 31, 2025, with ROC Pune.
new_features_launched: Next Tech Purchase®: A solution to forecast prospects' next technology investments.
Renewal Intelligence: Provides real-time renewal & subscription insights to track target accounts' lifecycle and identify expiring contracts.
Account Intelligence & Insights: Offers comprehensive account intelligence including firmographics, demographics, buyer group mapping, and competitor insights.
Event Audience Acquisition: A solution to maximize event success with precision-targeted audience acquisition.
Voice Verified Leads (MQLs): Delivers marketing qualified leads backed by real actions and voice verification.
other_crucial_details: ISO & SOC 2 Certified, GDPR & CCPA Compliant: Demonstrates adherence to high standards for data quality, security, and privacy regulations.
Utilizes proprietary ML programs to collect data from millions of public sources, which is then validated by researchers, subject matter experts, and data engineers.
Reported a revenue growth of 596.42% in FY 2022 (for Proplus Data Private Limited).
Operates through a web-based platform, offering solutions for precision targeting, real-time technology shift tracking, and data-driven buying signal insights.
The company's solutions are used by notable adopters such as 8x8, Adobe, AWS, Cisco, Commvault, and FICO.
